#!/bin/bash
set -uo pipefail

echo '=== VPS SYSTEM AUDIT ==='

echo ""

# 3. Firewall
echo '=== 3. FIREWALL ==='
ufw status 2>/dev/null || iptables -L -n 2>/dev/null | head
